name: Case Sealed
short_description: You found a new opportunity to save your daughter. The authorities who learned about your situation gave you a job opportunity. You have to be successful in this job, which is your last chance, and save up for your daughter's surgery. Remember, you only have 30 days.
detailed_description:
Story:
You need to save money for surgery for your daughter's terminal illness. Thanks to the rumors that have reached the authorities, you have been assigned to a new mission to save your daughter.

You must make the right decisions to save your daughter's life and send everyone to their rightful place. You need to save money for surgery before your daughter's life ends. Remember, everything is hidden in the details.

Game:

In this 2D point-click game, you must read the evidence in the crime files, witness statements and event descriptions. You must ask questions to the criminals and get answers from them. Then you must decide whether they are guilty or not. You will earn money according to the decisions you make. At the end of the day, you will make expenses such as babysitting expenses and rent. The scenarios in the game include criminal events such as fraud, murder and theft. You must read these events carefully and make the most correct decisions possible. You will face fines for wrong decisions. You must be careful about your expenses and decisions to save your daughter. Remember, your daughter only has 30 days to live.

About Scenarios:

All scenarios in the game are imaginary. They have no connection with real persons or real events.

Mature Content Description:

The game only mentions illegal events (harassment, smuggling, drugs, etc.) in written form. There is no visual or audio element.

supported_languages: English, French, Italian, German, Dutch, Russian, Turkish, Spanish - Spain
